message:
feat(protocol,server,persist): add RESP3 protocol support, TLS scaffolding, and expand E2E replication tests

Introduces RESP3 protocol parsing in fr-protocol, adds TLS connection
scaffolding in fr-server, and substantially expands the E2E test suite
with replication, persistence, and edge-case scenarios. The persist
layer gains additional RDB format support.

- fr-protocol: add RESP3 protocol types (Map, Set, Double, BigNumber,
  VerbatimString, Push) with parsing and serialization; update
  Cargo.toml for new dependencies
- fr-server/main.rs: add TLS listener scaffolding with certificate
  configuration; refine --replicaof startup sequence
- fr-server/tests/tcp_e2e_test.rs: add ~800 lines of new E2E tests
  covering replication handshake, PSYNC, ACK propagation, multi-db
  scenarios, and persistence round-trips
- fr-persist: extend RDB format support with new type codes; update
  Cargo.toml dependencies
- fr-runtime: extend replication INFO output for replica role
- fr-repl: add REPL mode adjustment
- fr-store/tests: add randomkey_panic_test.rs
- Update Cargo.lock, FEATURE_PARITY.md, and README

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -19,10 +19,10 @@ Non-negotiable policy:
 | Core data types and keyspace | parity_green | All 7 data types (String, Hash, List, Set, Sorted Set, HyperLogLog, Geo) plus Streams fully implemented with WRONGTYPE enforcement, per-database key isolation, and comprehensive edge-case coverage. Stream consumer groups with PEL tracking, XCLAIM/XAUTOCLAIM ownership transfer, XPENDING IDLE filtering, XINFO CONSUMERS real metrics.
